languages.text: "У меня нет причин вам не доверять, но Себериан не поверит, что поступки его дочери вышли за пределы обычных дворцовых интриг. Ювенна могла уверять вас в обратном, но эта особа слишком избалована всеобщим вниманием, чтобы заметить, как крепко к ней привязан отец". {n}Последние слова Лария произносит с усилием.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "У меня нет причин вам не доверять, но Себериан не поверит, что поступки его дочери вышли за пределы обычных дворцовых интриг. Ювенна могла уверять вас в обратном, но эта особа слишком избалована всеобщим вниманием, чтобы заметить,как крепко к ней привязан отец". {n}Последние слова Лария произносит с усилием.{/n}

languages.text: "I have no reason to doubt you, but Seberian will not believe his daughter's actions have gone beyond the usual palace intrigue. Juvenna might assure you otherwise, but she is too spoiled by everyone's regard even to notice how very fond Father is of her." {n}Laria utters the last words with some effort.{/n}
languages.original_text: "У меня нет причин вам не доверять, но Себериан не поверит, что поступки его дочери вышли за пределы обычных дворцовых интриг. Ювенна могла уверять вас в обратном, но эта особа слишком избалована всеобщим вниманием, чтобы заметить, как крепко к ней привязан отец". {n}Последние слова Лария произносит с усилием.{/n}

Juvenna might assure you otherwise, but she is too spoiled by everyone's regard even to notice how very fond Father is of her." {n}Laria utters the last words with some effort.{/n}

"I have no reason to doubt you, but Seberian will not believe his daughter's actions have gone beyond the usual palace intrigue. Juvenna might assure you otherwise, but she is too spoiled by everyone's regard even to notice how very fond Father is of her." {n}Laria utters the last words with some effort.{/n}

"I have no reason to doubt you, but Seberian will not believe his daughter's actions have gone beyond the usual palace intrigue. Juvenna might assure you otherwise, but she is too spoiled by everyone's regard even to notice how very fond Father is of her." {n}Laria utters the last words with some effort.{/n}

languages.text: “我没有理由怀疑你，但塞贝里安绝不会相信，他女儿的行为已经超出寻常宫廷权谋的范畴。尤文娜可能会信誓旦旦地否认，但她早已在众人的簇拥中迷失了自我，甚至察觉不到父亲对她有多偏爱。”{n}菈丽雅说出最后几个字时，颇有些勉强。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I have no reason to doubt you, but Seberian will not believe his daughter's actions have gone beyond the usual palace intrigue. Juvenna might assure you otherwise, but she is too spoiled by everyone's regard even to notice how very fond Father is of her." {n}Laria utters the last words with some effort.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我没有理由怀疑你，但塞贝里安绝不会相信，他女儿的行为已经超出寻常宫廷权谋的范畴。尤文娜可能会信誓旦旦地否认，但她早已在众人的簇拥中迷失了自我，甚至察觉不到父亲对她有多偏爱。”{n}菈丽雅说出最后几个字时，颇有些勉强。{/n}

languages.text: « Je n'ai pas de raison de douter de votre bonne foi, mais Seberian ne croira jamais que les agissements de sa fille ont dépassé les intrigues habituelles du palais. Juvenna aura beau prétendre le contraire, elle est trop gâtée par les attentions des courtisans pour remarquer à quel point notre père tient à elle. » {n}À en juger par le ton de sa voix, ce constat lui est pénible.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I have no reason to doubt you, but Seberian will not believe his daughter's actions have gone beyond the usual palace intrigue. Juvenna might assure you otherwise, but she is too spoiled by everyone's regard even to notice how very fond Father is of her." {n}Laria utters the last words with some effort.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Je n'ai pas de raison de douter de votre bonne foi, mais Seberian ne croira jamais que les agissements de sa fille ont dépassé les intrigues habituelles du palais. Juvenna aura beau prétendre le contraire, elle est trop gâtée par les attentions des courtisans pour remarquer à quel point notre père tient à elle. » {n}À en juger par le ton de sa voix, ce constat lui est pénible.{/n}

languages.text: "Sizden şüphe etmek için bir nedenim yok ama Seberian, kızının eylemlerinin alışılagelmiş saray entrikalarının ötesine geçmiş olduğuna inanmayacaktır. Juvenna sizi aksine ikna etmeye çalışabilir ancak herkesten gördüğü ilgi yüzünden öyle şımarmış ki babamın ona olan düşkünlüğünü göremiyor." {n}Laria, son sözleri biraz zorlanarak söylüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I have no reason to doubt you, but Seberian will not believe his daughter's actions have gone beyond the usual palace intrigue. Juvenna might assure you otherwise, but she is too spoiled by everyone's regard even to notice how very fond Father is of her." {n}Laria utters the last words with some effort.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Sizden şüphe etmek için bir nedenim yok ama Seberian, kızının eylemlerinin alışılagelmiş saray entrikalarının ötesine geçmiş olduğuna inanmayacaktır. Juvenna sizi aksine ikna etmeye çalışabilir ancak herkesten gördüğü ilgi yüzünden öyle şımarmış ki babamın ona olan düşkünlüğünü göremiyor." {n}Laria, son sözleri biraz zorlanarak söylüyor.{/n}

languages.text: «No tengo motivos para dudar de su palabra, pero Seberian no creerá que los actos de su hija hayan ido más allá de las intrigas de palacio habituales. Juvenna le dirá lo contrario, pero los demás la tienen tan acostumbrada a su estima como para ver el cariño que le tiene nuestro padre». {n}Laria murmura las últimas palabras con esfuerzo evidente.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I have no reason to doubt you, but Seberian will not believe his daughter's actions have gone beyond the usual palace intrigue. Juvenna might assure you otherwise, but she is too spoiled by everyone's regard even to notice how very fond Father is of her." {n}Laria utters the last words with some effort.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «No tengo motivos para dudar de su palabra, pero Seberian no creerá que los actos de su hija hayan ido más allá de las intrigas de palacio habituales. Juvenna le dirá lo contrario, pero los demás la tienen tan acostumbrada a su estima como para ver el cariño que le tiene nuestro padre». {n}Laria murmura las últimas palabras con esfuerzo evidente.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich habe keinen Grund, an Euch zu zweifeln, aber Seberian wird nicht glauben, dass das Treiben seiner Tochter über die üblichen Palastintrigen hinausgeht. Juvenna wird Euch das Gegenteil versichern, aber sie ist von der allgemeinen Anerkennung derart verwöhnt, dass sie gar nicht bemerkt, wie stolz Vater auf sie ist." {n}Die letzten Worte fallen Laria sichtlich schwer.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I have no reason to doubt you, but Seberian will not believe his daughter's actions have gone beyond the usual palace intrigue. Juvenna might assure you otherwise, but she is too spoiled by everyone's regard even to notice how very fond Father is of her." {n}Laria utters the last words with some effort.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe keinen Grund, an Euch zu zweifeln, aber Seberian wird nicht glauben, dass das Treiben seiner Tochter über die üblichen Palastintrigen hinausgeht. Juvenna wird Euch das Gegenteil versichern, aber sie ist von der allgemeinen Anerkennung derart verwöhnt, dass sie gar nicht bemerkt, wie stolz Vater auf sie ist." {n}Die letzten Worte fallen Laria sichtlich schwer.{/n}

languages.text: 「あなたを疑う理由は何もありませんが、シベリアは娘の行動が宮廷のいつもの陰謀を超えたものだと信じないでしょう。ユベナはあなたに違うことを保証するかもしれませんが、彼女は皆の愛情に甘やかされすぎて、父が娘をどれほど愛しているのか気づいていません。」{n}ラリアは最後の言葉を少し苦しそうに口にした。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I have no reason to doubt you, but Seberian will not believe his daughter's actions have gone beyond the usual palace intrigue. Juvenna might assure you otherwise, but she is too spoiled by everyone's regard even to notice how very fond Father is of her." {n}Laria utters the last words with some effort.{/n}
